summary.zh: 让装饰节点围绕中心缓慢运行，适合低频状态展示。
summary.en: Move a decorative node slowly around a center for low-frequency status displays.

definition.zh: 一个元素沿连续路径围绕另一个元素旋转。
definition.en: An element follows a closed path around a center or companion object.

description.zh: 控制完整循环的节奏；持续动态需要支持暂停并保持低干扰。
description.en: Controls the rhythm of one full cycle; continuous motion should stay pausable and low-distraction.

purpose.zh: 让辅助节点围绕中心缓慢运行，用于表达持续活性、同步或环境状态。
purpose.en: Move a secondary node slowly around a center to express ongoing activity, synchronization, or ambient status.

frequency.zh: 只用于低频环境状态，且同屏保持单一轨道焦点。
frequency.en: Reserve for low-frequency ambient status with a single orbital focal point per view.

trigger.zh: 由持续状态启动，组件离屏、失焦或状态完成时暂停。
trigger.en: Start from an ongoing state and pause when offscreen, unfocused, or complete.

enterExit.zh: 从稳定轨道点进入并匀速运行，结束时减速停在有意义的位置。
enterExit.en: Enter from a stable orbital point, run steadily, and settle at a meaningful position on completion.

interruptibility.zh: 暂停和恢复保持当前角度，方向切换从当前位置连续进行。
interruptibility.en: Pause and resume at the current angle, changing direction continuously from that point.

gestureRules.zh: 轨道通常不响应手势；需要控制时提供独立播放按钮。
gestureRules.en: Orbit motion is usually non-gestural; provide a separate playback control when needed.

reducedMotion.zh: 显示中心和轨道节点的静态关系，补充状态文字。
reducedMotion.en: Show a static center-node relationship with supporting status text.

reviewNotes.zh: 避免轨道节点穿过文字或操作控件。
reviewNotes.en: Keep orbital nodes away from text and controls.

reviewNotes.zh: 验证无限动画在后台正确暂停。
reviewNotes.en: Verify that infinite animation pauses in the background.
